name: volvo-car-card
description: Custom Home Assistant card for the Volvo Cars integration

scripts.build: bun scripts/version.ts && bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/volvo-car-card.js --target browser --minify
scripts.build:dev: bun scripts/version.ts && bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/volvo-car-card.js --target browser --sourcemap=external
scripts.watch: bun scripts/version.ts && bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/volvo-car-card.js --target browser --sourcemap=external --watch
